name: Company Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the raw converted rice with melted butter or margarine in a crockpot.
2. Stir to coat the rice thoroughly.
3. Add all remaining ingredients, except slivered almonds and 2 tablespoons of green onions, into the crockpot.
4. Stir well to combine everything.
5. Sprinkle reserved slivered almonds and green onions over the top of the mixture.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours or High for 3 to 4 hours.
